briefdescription.para: Serialize a packet into a wire-format buffer.
Deserialize a wire-format buffer into a packet.
Send an ACK packet to the source.
Handle an incoming ACK by clearing the pending entry.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Router *r, uint8_t dst, uint8_t type, uint8_t seq, const uint8_t *data, uint8_t len)
memberdef.name: queue_pending

briefdescription.para: Queue a pending ACK entry for reliable delivery.
Retry pending packets that have timed out.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Router *r, uint8_t node_id, SYN_Transport *transport, SYN_RouterHandler *handlers, uint8_t handler_cap)
memberdef.name: syn_router_init

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Router *r, SYN_PendingAck *pending, uint8_t cap, uint16_t timeout_ms, uint8_t max_retries)
memberdef.name: syn_router_enable_ack

briefdescription.para: Register a handler for a message type.

simplesect.para: true if registered, false if handler table is full.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Router *r, uint8_t dst, uint8_t type, const uint8_t *data, uint8_t len, bool reliable)
memberdef.name: syn_router_send

parameterdescription.para: If true and ACK is enabled, wait for ACK with retry.

simplesect.para: true if sent (or queued for retry).

briefdescription.para: Poll for incoming packets and dispatch handlers.

detaileddescription.para: Also checks for ACK timeouts and retransmits if needed. Call from your main loop.
